name: Assistant
condition: Kill an enemy attacked by any of your allies earlier in the same round.

name: Assassin
condition: Kill an enemy before it takes its first turn.

name: Accountant
condition: Have zero cards in your hand each time you rest.

name: Acrobat
condition: Lose a card to negate suffering 5 or more damage.

name: Ascetic
condition: Collect fewer loot tokens than any other character.

name: Closer
condition: Kill the last enemy to die in the scenario.

name: Cleaner
condition: Collect three or more loot tokens in the same turn.

name: Bastion
condition: Occupy a door hex adjacent to two or more enemies at the end of a round.

name: Bully
condition: Kill an enemy that has two or more negative conditions.

name: Conservator
condition: Never perform an action with a lost icon.

name: Daredevil
condition: Add two cards to your lost pile before your first rest.

name: Dawdler
condition: Never use your lowest initiative played card as your initiative card.

name: Duelist
condition: Never exit a hex adjacent to an enemy except through forced movement.

name: Diehard
condition: Never have your hit point value drop below half your maximum hit point value (rounded up).

name: Dynamo
condition: Kill an enemy with an attack that would have caused at least 4 more points of damage than necessary.

name: Egoist
condition: Collect more loot tokens than any other character.

name: Executioner
condition: Kill an undamaged enemy with a single attack action.

name: Gambler
condition: Kill an enemy with an attack that has disadvantage.

name: Exterminator
condition: Kill one or more enemies of each monster type that appears in the scenario.

name: Layabout
condition: Gain 7 or fewer experience before any bonus scenario experience.

name: Hunter
condition: Kill one or more elite enemies, or two or more for four characters.

name: Insomniac
condition: Suffer damage from an attack in the same round you long rest.

name: masochist
condition: End the scenario with a hit point value of 3 or less.

name: miser
condition: Never exit a room with loot tokens in it.

name: Mugger
condition: Kill an enemy and loot the loot token it drops in the same round.

name: Pacifist
condition: Kill three or fewer enemies.

name: Optimist
condition: Remove a negative condition from yourself or an ally two or more times.

name: Overachiever
condition: Kill an enemy and open a door in the same turn, in either order.

name: Opener
condition: Kill the first enemy to die in the scenario.

name: Pauper
condition: Never collect a loot token from end-of-turn looting.

name: Peacemonger
condition: Never kill an enemy.

name: Perfectionist
condition: End the scenario with your hit point value equal to your maximum hit point value.

name: Pedestrian
condition: Never enter a hex occupied by an ally, enemy, objective, or obstacle.

name: Pickpocket
condition: Collect two or more loot tokens by performing a loot ability while adjacent to one or more enemies.

name: Plebeian
condition: Never kill an elite enemy, named enemy, or boss.

name: Prepper
condition: Perform no attack abilities in the first three rounds.

name: Pincusion
condition: Be targeted by attacks from three or more enemies in the same round.

name: Prohibitionist
condition: Never use a potion.

name: Ritualist
condition: Kill an enemy while three or more elements are strong or waning.

name: Recluse
condition: Never end your turn adjacent to any other character (gain one additional checkmark for four characters).

name: Ravager
condition: Perform two actions with lost icons in the same turn.

name: Rambler
condition: End no more than three of your turns in the hex in which you started the turn, except when long resting.

name: Promoter
condition: Perform an ability targeting an ally before your first rest and in between each of your rests.

name: Sadist
condition: Kill five or more enemies.

name: Scrambler
condition: Never long rest.

name: Slayer
condition: Kill two or more enemies in the same round.

name: Shirker
condition: Kill an enemy not adjacent to you while you are adjacent to another enemy.

name: Sleeper
condition: Have one or more cards in your hand each time you rest.

name: Slowpoke
condition: Move no more than two hexes on each turn.

name: Specialist
condition: Never perform a basic action.

name: Straggler
condition: Never short rest.

name: Streamliner
condition: Have five or more total cards in your hand and discard pile at the end of the scenario.

name: Sluggard
condition: Perform a long rest while at your maximum hit point value, after you have already suffered damage.

name: Wallflower
condition: End each of your turns adjacent to a wall, obstacle, or objective.

name: Tormentor
condition: Apply a different negative condition to an enemy that already has one or more negative conditions.

name: Vanguard
condition: Never attack an enemy that has already acted in the round.

name: Weakling
condition: Become exhausted before any other character.

name: Wastrel
condition: Lose a card to negate 2 or less damage from an attack.

name: Zealot
condition: Have three or fewer total cards in your hand and discard pile while also not exhausted at the end of the scenario.

name: Workhorse
condition: Gain 13 or more experience before any bonus scenario experience.
